title: Argus coherence manifest
description: The hand-authored seam manifest for a project's coherence eye (DR-029). Code is the structural SSOT; this is a human projection of it, kept honest by project_coherence_scan. Authoritative shape: ergon_coherence::manifest. Unknown keys are rejected (deny_unknown_fields) â€” a typo'd key is a parse error the scan surfaces, never a silent drop.

components.description: The named top-level peers between which seams run (altitude-0).

spine.description: The one load-bearing cross-component invariant whose violation is the highest-severity misfit. Omit when the project has no single spine.

description.description: One line naming the invariant, e.g. 'consumerâ†’platform, never reverse'.

sourceNode.description: The single upstream every seam derives from (e.g. a spec). camelCase. Omit for the common case of no single source node.

seams.description: The seam inventory, rendered in declaration order (diff-quiet).

id.description: Stable id â€” the map and the scan key on this.

components.description: The components this seam runs between.

status.description: Declared presence â€” a human assertion, re-judged, never a guarantee.

module.description: Repo-relative path the seam lives at; the scan's manifestâ†”code delta keys on it. Omit for a designed-but-unbuilt (status: absent) seam â€” the scan then skips its presence check rather than forcing an invented path.

test.description: Repo-relative path of the seam's test, if any.

submap.description: A child-scope manifest this seam expands into (recursion â€” reserved; v1 tooling stays altitude-0).
